programme.desc: In Gunfight at Red Sands, Richard Harrison rides into a border town torn apart by greed and violence. When ruthless bandits threaten the land and its people, a mysterious gunman takes justice into his own hands. programme.title: Mclintock! 1963
programme.desc: John Wayne leads the charge in McLintock!, a rip-roaring Western comedy brimming with action, romance, and frontier spirit. As wealthy cattle baron George Washington McLintock tries to keep the peace between feuding homesteaders, rowdy cowhands, and local Native tribes, he also faces his toughest battle yet—his fiery estranged wife (Maureen O’Hara), who’s just returned to town. Filled with slapstick brawls, lively banter, and heartwarming humor, McLintock! delivers classic Western entertainment with larger-than-life charm.

Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Glengarry Glen Ross
programme.desc: Adapted from his Pulitzer Prize-winning play, Glengarry Glen Ross shows David Mamet at his searing, profane best. A group of Chicago real-estate salesmen-cum-con artists live on the edge. Life is good for the one on a roll. For the rest, life hangs in the balance. There is no room for losers. What doesn't kill them in this spa/hospital/grand hotel will only make them stronger as they make their way through an obstacle course of sexual temptations, mechanical contraptions and dietary breakthroughs. programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail meet with the team at Advanced Vitality to explore the cutting edge of preventative healthcare. With over 60% of Americans facing accelerated cellular aging, the company is looking to scale fast—and needs the right strategy to do it. Next, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s joins the conversation to share how her insect-based dog treats are creating buzz in the pet industry. Her clever and down-to-earth grassroots marketing approach (pun intended) is changing the game for alternative protein sources. Finally, Kevin and Toli sit down with leaders from Hammer Haag Steel and Zenith Trek to dive into the challenges and opportunities of building complex, large-scale equipment and structures.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team gets back to work—this time diving into cross-marketing strategies for Advanced Vitality. Over at Hammer Haag, the team discusses launching a gritty new “Micro Dirty Jobs” miniseries to spotlight American manufacturing in action. We’re also introduced to serial entrepreneur Jeff Kline, founder of 1-800-Medigap, who brings a powerhouse presence to the team’s growing roster. Meanwhile, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s returns for a full brand overhaul with the experts. Newest A-Team member Rudy Mawer steps in with high-level influencer insight and a mission to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs. And finally, Zenith Trek makes bold moves to break into big box retail—with the A-Team guiding the way.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with the creation of this unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments, and has broadcast globally in over 150 countries and territories. Televised WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: S1E1 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro team up to show the game from the perspective of some of hockey’s greatest players. On NHL After Dark, Detroit Red Wings forward Tomáš Tatar puts his street hockey skills to the test with challenging stickhandling drills. Pittsburgh Penguins center Evgeni Malkin, three-time Stanley Cup champion and 2012 Hart Memorial Trophy winner, showcases his smooth hands and technical mastery as he takes on drills that look simple but are far from easy. Chicago Blackhawks defender Duncan Keith elevates target practice to an art form while outmaneuvering his opponents with precision and speed.

programme.title: S1E2 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro join forces to capture the game through the eyes of hockey’s best players. Vancouver Canucks duo Daniel and Henrik Sedin showcase their legendary on-ice chemistry through a series of unconventional drills. Philadelphia Flyers center Claude Giroux returns for his second episode, using lightning-fast hands and impressive physicality to outmaneuver his opponents. Colorado Avalanche forward Gabriel Landeskog powers through defenders and scores hard-hitting goals that put our cameras to the ultimate test. New Jersey Devils goalie Cory Schneider takes on unique drills that double the challenge and push his skills to the limit.

programme.title: S1E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike delivers nonstop action with the world’s top riders. Watch Rachel Atherton, downhill champion, tear through Arrowhead, CA, Aaron Gwin, gravity master, and Steve Storey, trail innovator, dominate Trail Boik Time. Join Remy Metailler, freestyle phenom, in Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, and see Gee Atherton, enduro legend, and Dan Atherton, mountain bike pioneer, push speed, skill, and style to the max.

programme.title: S1E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you inside the world of pro cycling and mountain biking. Follow Peter Sagan, multi-time World Champion, as his story unfolds, watch Loic Bruni, downhill superstar, conquer thrilling courses, and join Geoff Gulevich, trail master, as he charges through British Columbia’s most scenic and technical singletrack in an all-out Trail Party. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every ride.

programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The ghouls get the N96 Air Grabber installed on the '71 Charger 440 Six Pack Triple Green car. It's started and is ready for final assembly. The owners of '70 Cuda 383 Automatic FE5 Rallye Red Car visit to check on the restoration progress.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark is hired to restore the body, paint, and suspension of a '70 AAR Cuda 340 Six Barrel car. The shop gets some needed upgrades and the '71 Charger 440 Six Pack Triple Green car is completed to OEM Specifications.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: The '70 Sunroof Challenger is painted and ready for final assembly. The '69 Daytona Charger is disassembled and readied to be shipped to the media blasters. Mark and the Ghoulz head out to the junkyard to blow off some steam playing paintball.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz
programme.desc: Mark and the Ghoulz use their brand new Shop Crane to lower the body of the '71 Cuda 340 Triple Black 'Phantasm' Tribute car onto its restored suspension and its drive-train is assembled and installed.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands 1963
programme.desc: In Gunfight at Red Sands, Richard Harrison rides into a border town torn apart by greed and violence. When ruthless bandits threaten the land and its people, a mysterious gunman takes justice into his own hands. With sweeping desert vistas, tense standoffs, and the first-ever Spaghetti Western score by Ennio Morricone, this action-packed tale blazes with the grit and glory of the frontier.

programme.title: Mclintock! 1963
programme.desc: John Wayne leads the charge in McLintock!, a rip-roaring Western comedy brimming with action, romance, and frontier spirit. As wealthy cattle baron George Washington McLintock tries to keep the peace between feuding homesteaders, rowdy cowhands, and local Native tribes, he also faces his toughest battle yet—his fiery estranged wife (Maureen O’Hara), who’s just returned to town. Filled with slapstick brawls, lively banter, and heartwarming humor, McLintock! delivers classic Western entertainment with larger-than-life charm.
